title: lappula thymifolia
intro: Lappula thymifolia, also known as Prickly Ballhead or Blue Thistle, is a flowering plant species in the borage family, known for its unique, prickly appearance and medicinal properties. Traditionally, it has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lappula thymifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Lappula thymifolia are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
